description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Test Wheel that runs on every push. The workflow should have two jobs: build_wheel_x86_64 and build_wheel_aarch64. The build_wheel_x86_64 job should build and test wheels on multiple Python versions and operating systems (ubuntu-latest and windows-latest), while the build_wheel_aarch64 job should build and test wheels on aarch64 architecture with multiple Python versions using a manylinux2014_aarch64 Docker image. Both jobs should upload the resulting wheels as artifacts and deploy them to PyPI.
